name: RT · eCommerce — Sample
sql:
SELECT * FROM (VALUES
  ('Electronics', 'TechPro', 'Online', 4200, 1890000, 310, 28.4),
  ('Electronics', 'TechPro', 'In-Store', 2800, 1260000, 140, 24.1),
  ('Electronics', 'NovaBrand', 'Online', 3100, 1240000, 280, 26.8),
  ('Apparel', 'StyleCo', 'Online', 12400, 620000, 1820, 52.3),
  ('Apparel', 'StyleCo', 'In-Store', 8700, 435000, 640, 48.9),
  ('Apparel', 'UrbanWear', 'Online', 9800, 490000, 1420, 51.1),
  ('Home & Garden', 'HomeLux', 'Online', 5600, 840000, 310, 42.7),
  ('Home & Garden', 'HomeLux', 'In-Store', 3900, 585000, 170, 39.2),
  ('Sports', 'ActiveGear', 'Online', 7200, 1080000, 520, 38.6),
  ('Sports', 'ActiveGear', 'In-Store', 4100, 615000, 190, 34.9),
  ('Beauty', 'GlowUp', 'Online', 18600, 744000, 920, 63.2),
  ('Beauty', 'NaturalMe', 'Online', 14200, 568000, 710, 61.8)
) AS t(category, brand, channel, units_sold, revenue, returns, margin_pct)
